creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

according to Alexander Best this has already been committed but  
just half of the contained patch is committed. USBDEVS and umass  
have been updated in 7-STABLE but CAM hasn't been patched. 
suspend this PR until somebody using a Meizu M6 confirms if it's 
now working.
